records.question: The San Diego Gulls are a professional ice hockey team in the American Hockey League (AHL) which began playing in the 2015–16 season, the Gulls play their home games at which indoor arena located at Sports Arena Blvd in Point Loma, San Diego?
records.judge_reasoning:
The gold answer "Valley View Casino Center" and the prediction "Pechanga Arena San Diego" refer to the same physical arena. The venue was renamed Pechanga Arena San Diego in 2018, having previously been known as Valley View Casino Center. Since both names refer to the same location where the San Diego Gulls play, the prediction is considered a valid alternative name for the same entity.
